prompt: 项目 projects/lesson/销售训练营 已完成 3-7 阶段，请生成 DOC、PPT、HTML 三端交付计划和 manifest。
expected: Route to tri_channel_plan, audit stages 3-7 plus content-model, create delivery-plan.md and delivery-manifest.json, produce doc/ppt/html leaf work packets without generating final course正文 by script, and include .agents/skills/claude-design as the HTML/PPT artifact design executor with artifact_paths and writeback_status requirements when real HTML or courseware output is selected.

prompt: 只为 projects/lesson/产品培训课 生成 PPT 交付计划，DOC 和 HTML 暂时不做。
expected: Route to selected_leaf_plan, create a shared delivery map and a ppt leaf packet only, mark doc/html as omitted, and avoid empty leaf outputs.

prompt: 为 projects/lesson/销售训练营 生成最终 PPTX 课件，并做视觉 polish 和导出验证。
expected: Route to visual_artifact_delivery, create the ppt leaf packet from the shared delivery map, set design_executor to .agents/skills/claude-design, require artifact writeback target, artifact_paths, writeback_status, selected upstream design modules, visual_system, verification/export evidence, and quality_verdict, then hand off artifact execution to the PPT leaf without letting scripts generate course正文.

prompt: 修复 projects/lesson/管理课/8-多端交付生成 的 manifest，PPT 已更新但 DOC 和 HTML 没变。
expected: Route to manifest_repair, preserve unaffected targets, update delivery-manifest.json and consistency evidence for the changed PPT target only.

prompt: 还没有课时正文和活动测评，直接生成三端最终课件。
expected: Route to blocked_or_redirect, report missing upstream owned by stages 5 and 6, and do not fabricate DOC/PPT/HTML content.
